a = int(input())
for i in range(9999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999):
  if len(set(list(str(a)))) == 4 and i>0:
    print(a)
    break
  else:
    a+=1
